report_meta.author: B (Opus 4.7 1M)
report_meta.north_star: 确认本地新旧文档都具备组织归属、来源登记、去重保护，能够作为后续本地→云端同步的可信数据基础

score.verdict: 基本可用. 需修 P0+P1 后再进入 Step 3.

step0_historical_migration.note: documents 100% 通过, v2_documents 3 行 race 残留

step1_new_import_team_context.note: raw_file 验证通过, 但历史 1020 条无 source_registry

step2_dedup_orphan_cleanup.note: UNIQUE INDEX 真生效, 0 孤儿, dedup 早返回 worker 串行测试不全

compatibility_exception_path.note: 14 处调用方兼容, worktree 部署问题不计入

step3_sync_readiness.note: 字段就位但 source_registry backfill 缺失

knowledge_documents.note: 完全没 org/owner 字段, 双轨制问题

p0_blocking_step3.issue: 历史 1020 v2_documents 没 source_registry 登记 (99.8%)
p0_blocking_step3.impact: Step 3 sync 漏 99% 历史数据
p0_blocking_step3.fix: 写 backfill 脚本回写 source_registry

p0_blocking_step3.issue: Electron 启动 backend 时 reload-dir 用 worktree 而非主仓库
p0_blocking_step3.impact: 代码改动不生效, 测试无效
p0_blocking_step3.fix: 固定启动 reload-dir 到主仓库; 清理过期 worktree

p1_step3_pre_recommended.issue: source_registry.content_hash 是双重 hash + 截断
upsert_canonical fallback race condition (3 行残留)
API duplicate 计数不反映 ingest 层 dedup
knowledge_documents (610 条) 没 org/owner 字段
p1_step3_pre_recommended.fix: 迁移到 v2 / 加字段 / 声明 legacy
源 source_registry 事件链接到 outbox

key_questions_answered.step0_truly_done: 部分 (3 行 race 残留)
key_questions_answered.step1_truly_done: raw_file 是, task/meeting/weekly_review 经 upsert 路径需补
key_questions_answered.new_files_100pct_team_fields: raw_file 路径 100%, upsert 路径有 race
key_questions_answered.new_files_100pct_source_registry: raw_file 路径 100%, upsert 路径未接
key_questions_answered.step3_recommended_now: 不建议. 先做 P0-1 + P0-2 + Step 1.5 (~1.5 天)
